stemHtml: ATC must relay essential local traffic information to departing and arriving aircraft without delay. How is "essential local traffic" defined?

options.a: Aircraft, vehicles, or personnel on or near the runway, or traffic in the take-off, climb-out, or final approach area that may pose a collision hazard to departing or arriving aircraft.
options.b: Aircraft, vehicles, or personnel on the runway, or traffic in the take-off, climb-out, or initial approach area that may pose a collision hazard to departing or arriving aircraft.
options.c: Aircraft, vehicles, or personnel on or near the runway, or traffic in the take-off, climb-out, or final approach area that may pose a collision hazard to IFR flights.
options.d: Aircraft, vehicles, or personnel on the runway, or traffic in the take-off, climb-out, or final approach area that may pose a collision hazard to IFR flights.
